title: lathyrus subalpinus
intro: Lathyrus subalpinus, also known as the alpine pea, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Europe. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of various conditions, including respiratory issues, gastrointestinal problems, and joint pain. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus subalpinus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed for its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
